stonetop.summary: Tor walking the world in disguise, testing mortals with a challenge and a missing finger.

system.concept: Tor walking the world in disguise, testing mortals with a challenge and a missing finger.
system.description: Many tales tell of a stranger met in an unlikely place. The stranger is in some sort of pickle, or challenges our hero, or presents a tempting opportunity. Whatever else happens, the stranger ends up vanishing — but not before our hero notices his missing finger, and realizes that they just met Tor. Rise to the occasion and you win a gift: a treasure, a secret, a prophecy, or some useful advice. Come up short, and you wind up cursed, or 'win' some treasure that brings only ruin and woe.
